titleStmt.title: SII 9.680: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 680. (A.R. No. 15 of 1910.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE ENTRANCE OF THE LAKSHMINARAYANA TEMPLE AT KOLLEGAL, KOLLEGAL TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1491, Śukla, Pushya, śu. 10 corresponding to A.D. 1569 December 18, Sunday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśiva-Mahārāya. It records that Rāmarājayadēva-Mahā-arasu, son of the Mahāmaṇḍalēsvara Rāmarāja- Tirumalarājayadēva, made a gift of the village Koḷogāla in Śivasamudra-sthala, a sub-division of Hadināḍa-sīme, as pallakki-umbaḷi to Rāmarāja-Nāyaka, the cheif of Hadināḍa-sīme.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīvijayā
dbhudayaśālivāhanaṣakava
rṣa 1491 saṁdu varttamānakke saluva
śuklasaṁvatsarada puṣya śu 10 lu śrīmanma
hārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratā
pa śrīsadāśivamahārāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁgeye
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāja tirumalarājarasa
ra komāra rāmarājayadēvamahāarasugaḷu hadināḍa sīmeya prabhu
rāmarājanāyakarige koṭṭa Uṁbaḷiya grāmada kramaveṁteṁdare hadinā
ḍa sīmeya śivasamudrada staḷada koḷogālada staḷavanu ninage pallakiya Uṁ
baḷiyāgi koṭṭevāgi Ā staḷake saluva haḷehiriyūra catussīmeyoḷagaṇa
gade bedalu suṁka suvarnādāya tōṭa modalāda sakala svāmyavanu pū
rvamariyādiyali niṁna putrapautraparaṁpareyāgi Ācaṁdrārkasthāyiga
ḷāgi Anubhavisikoṁḍu bahiri dēvadāya brahmādāya sarvamānya
pūrvamariyādeyaṁdu koṭṭakoḷogālada staḷada śilāśā
sana . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahā
rēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavētu . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.680 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
